notes: Built from full local xlsx: 598 rows of allmoxy_core_customer + 22,244 Stripe Sync transactions (classified). Currently-active = customer has a 2026 Stripe charge. Dollar retention is a logo-weighted estimate of SUBSCRIPTION MRR only — services (project-based, non-recurring) and Connect (no per-customer attribution) are both excluded so the recurring-revenue story isn't inflated by one-off invoices. Active-today reconciled with customer_profiles (subscription MRR > 0 in latest complete month): 215 → 198.
